problem_text_cn:
## 六、(22分)

如图所示，一个质量为$m$，半径为$r_0$，电感为$L$的匀质超导（零电阻）细小圆环，水平静止在竖直的圆柱形磁棒上方，圆环的中央轴与磁棒的中央轴重合，取为向上的$z$坐标轴。开始时圆环内没有电流，环心位于$z=0$，$r=0$处，其中$r$为径向坐标量。圆环周围的磁场相对$z$轴对称分布，磁感应强度$B$的轴向、径向分量是
$$ B_z=B_0(1-\alpha z),\quad B_r=B_0\beta r, $$
其中$B_0$，$\alpha$，$\beta$均为正常量。$t=0$时刻将环自由释放，环将在竖直方向上平动，运动过程中圆环电流的正方向取为题图中虚线箭头所示方向。
(1)不考虑圆环是否全与磁棒上表面接触，导出环心坐标$z$与圆环电流$i$随时间$t$变化的函数$z(t)$与$i(t)$的表达式。
(2)设已给数据为：
磁棒：上表面位于$z=-10cm$处；
圆环：$m=50mg$，$r_0=0.5cm$，$L=1.3×10^{-8}H$；
磁场：$B_0=0.01T$，$\alpha=16m^{-1}$。
试求$\beta$的数值和单位，再求$z(t)$，$i(t)$表达式中除$t$以外的物理量的数值和所取单位。
problem_text_en:
## Six. (22 points)

As shown in the figure, a homogeneous superconducting (zero‑resistance) thin ring of mass $m$, radius $r_0$, and inductance $L$ is initially at rest horizontally above a vertical cylindrical magnetic rod. The central axis of the ring coincides with that of the rod, taken as the upward $z$‑axis. Initially there is no current in the ring; its centre is at $z=0$, $r=0$, where $r$ is the radial coordinate. The magnetic field around the ring is symmetric about the $z$‑axis, with axial and radial components
$$ B_z=B_0(1-\alpha z),\quad B_r=B_0\beta r, $$
where $B_0$, $\alpha$, $\beta$ are positive constants. At $t=0$ the ring is released freely; it will move translationally in the vertical direction. The positive direction of the ring current during the motion is taken as the direction of the dashed arrow in the figure.
(1) Without considering whether the ring remains entirely in contact with the upper surface of the magnetic rod, derive the expressions $z(t)$ and $i(t)$ for the centre coordinate $z$ and the ring current $i$ as functions of time $t$.
(2) Given the data:
Magnetic rod: upper surface located at $z=-10\,\text{cm}$;
Ring: $m=50\,\text{mg}$, $r_0=0.5\,\text{cm}$, $L=1.3×10^{-8}\,\text{H}$;
Magnetic field: $B_0=0.01\,\text{T}$, $\alpha=16\,\text{m}^{-1}$.
Determine the numerical value and unit of $\beta$, and also find the numerical values and units of the physical quantities (other than $t$) appearing in the expressions for $z(t)$ and $i(t)$.
problem_solution_cn:
## 六、(22分)
(1) 圆环位于$z$位置时，向上速度记为$v$，沿题图虚线箭矢方向的环路动生感应电动势为
$$ \begin{aligned}
\mathscr{E}_{\text{动}}&=-\frac{\mathrm{d}\Phi}{\mathrm{d}t}=-\frac{\mathrm{d}}{\mathrm{d}t}(\pi r_{0}^{2}B_{z})=-\pi r_{0}^{2}\frac{\mathrm{d}B_{z}}{\mathrm{d}z}\frac{\mathrm{d}z}{\mathrm{d}t} \\
&=-\pi r_{0}^{2}(-\alpha B_{0})v=\pi r_{0}^{2}\alpha B_{0}v. \qquad(3\text{分})
\end{aligned} $$
$\mathscr{E}_{\text{动}}$的存在使环中出现电流$i$，激起自感电动势
$$ \mathscr{E}_{L}=-L\frac{\mathrm{d}i}{\mathrm{d}t}, $$
回路电阻为零，得
$$ \mathscr{E}_{\text{动}}+\mathscr{E}_{L}=0,\;\Rightarrow\;\pi r_{0}^{2}\alpha B_{0}v=L\frac{\mathrm{d}i}{\mathrm{d}t},\qquad(2\text{分}) $$
$$ \Rightarrow\;\mathrm{d}i=\frac{\pi}{L}r_{0}^{2}\alpha B_{0}v\,\mathrm{d}t=\frac{\pi}{L}r_{0}^{2}\alpha B_{0}\,\mathrm{d}z. $$
$t=0$时，环位于$z=0$处，$i=0$，故环在$z$处时电流为
$$ i=\frac{\pi}{L}r_{0}^{2}\alpha B_{0}z.\qquad(2\text{分}) $$
圆环电流在磁场中受$B_{z}$的合力为零，受$B_{r}$的合力$F_{z}$方向朝下，可表述为
$$ F_{z}=-i(2\pi r_{0})B_{r_{0}}=-2\pi^{2}r_{0}^{4}\frac{\alpha\beta}{L}B_{0}^{2}z, $$
$$ \Rightarrow\;F_{z}=-kz,\quad k=2\pi^{2}r_{0}^{4}\frac{\alpha\beta}{L}B_{0}^{2}, $$
是一个线性恢复力。$z$方向圆环的动力学方程为
$$ -kz-mg=m\ddot{z}.\qquad(4\text{分}) $$
力平衡点在
$$ z_{0}=-mg/k=-\frac{mgL}{2\pi^{2}r_{0}^{4}\alpha\beta B_{0}^{2}}. $$
圆环在此平衡点上、下作简谐振动，振幅和角频率分别为
$$ A=|z_{0}|=\frac{mgL}{2\pi^{2}r_{0}^{4}\alpha\beta B_{0}^{2}},\quad\omega=\sqrt{\frac{k}{m}}=\sqrt{\frac{2\pi^{2}r_{0}^{4}\alpha\beta B_{0}^{2}}{mL}}.\qquad(2\text{分}) $$
运动方程，即$z=z(t)$的函数表述式为
$$ z=A(\cos\omega t-1).\qquad(1\text{分}) $$
环中电流为
$$ i=\frac{\pi}{L}r_{0}^{2}\alpha B_{0}z=\frac{\pi}{L}r_{0}^{2}\alpha B_{0}A(\cos\omega t-1), $$
$$ \Rightarrow\begin{cases}
i=I_{0}(\cos\omega t-1),\\
I_{0}=\frac{\pi}{L}r_{0}^{2}\alpha B_{0}\frac{mgL}{2\pi^{2}r_{0}^{4}\alpha\beta B_{0}^{2}}=\frac{mg}{2\pi r_{0}^{2}\beta B_{0}}.
\end{cases}\qquad(2\text{分}) $$
(2) 形成$\mathscr{E}_{\text{动}}$的物理原因是圆环在竖直方向上运动时，环中带电粒子受磁场力$F=qv\times B$的作用。据此可导得（略）$\mathrm{d}l$环元所得电动势为
$$ \mathrm{d}\mathscr{E}_{\text{动}}=(v\times B)\cdot\mathrm{d}l=vB_{r_{0}}\,\mathrm{d}l, $$
积分成为
$$ \begin{aligned}
\mathscr{E}&=\oint_{\text{环}}vB_{r_{0}}\,\mathrm{d}l=vB_{0}\beta r_{0}\cdot 2\pi r_{0}, \\
&\Rightarrow\;\mathscr{E}_{\text{动}}=2\pi r_{0}^{2}\beta B_{0}v.
\end{aligned} $$
与(1)问解答中由法拉第定律所得表述式
$$ \mathscr{E}_{\text{动}}=\pi r_{0}^{2}\alpha B_{0}v $$
相比较，即得
$$ \beta=\frac{\alpha}{2}=8\,\text{m}^{-1}.\qquad(5\text{分}) $$
（此式也可由磁场高斯定理导出，略。）
将已给数据和算得的$\beta$值，代入$z(t)$，$i(t)$表述式中相关的物理量，可得
$$ A=4.05\,\text{cm},\quad\omega=15.6\,/\!\text{s},\quad I_{0}=39.1\,\text{A}.\qquad(1\text{分}) $$
因磁棒上表面位于$z=-10\,\text{cm}$处，圆环往返运动过程中不会与磁棒相碰。
problem_solution_en:
## Six. (22 points)
(1) When the ring is at position $z$, let its upward velocity be $v$. The motional electromotive force along the direction of the dashed arrow in the figure is
$$ \begin{aligned}
\mathscr{E}_{\text{mot}}&=-\frac{\mathrm{d}\Phi}{\mathrm{d}t}=-\frac{\mathrm{d}}{\mathrm{d}t}(\pi r_{0}^{2}B_{z})=-\pi r_{0}^{2}\frac{\mathrm{d}B_{z}}{\mathrm{d}z}\frac{\mathrm{d}z}{\mathrm{d}t} \\
&=-\pi r_{0}^{2}(-\alpha B_{0})v=\pi r_{0}^{2}\alpha B_{0}v. \qquad(3\,\text{pts})
\end{aligned} $$
The existence of $\mathscr{E}_{\text{mot}}$ induces a current $i$ in the ring, generating a self‑induction emf
$$ \mathscr{E}_{L}=-L\frac{\mathrm{d}i}{\mathrm{d}t}. $$
Since the resistance is zero,
$$ \mathscr{E}_{\text{mot}}+\mathscr{E}_{L}=0,\;\Rightarrow\;\pi r_{0}^{2}\alpha B_{0}v=L\frac{\mathrm{d}i}{\mathrm{d}t},\qquad(2\,\text{pts}) $$
$$ \Rightarrow\;\mathrm{d}i=\frac{\pi}{L}r_{0}^{2}\alpha B_{0}v\,\mathrm{d}t=\frac{\pi}{L}r_{0}^{2}\alpha B_{0}\,\mathrm{d}z. $$
At $t=0$, the ring is at $z=0$ and $i=0$, so when the ring is at $z$ the current is
$$ i=\frac{\pi}{L}r_{0}^{2}\alpha B_{0}z.\qquad(2\,\text{pts}) $$
The net force on the ring current due to $B_{z}$ is zero; the net force due to $B_{r}$, denoted $F_{z}$, is downward and can be written as
$$ F_{z}=-i(2\pi r_{0})B_{r_{0}}=-2\pi^{2}r_{0}^{4}\frac{\alpha\beta}{L}B_{0}^{2}z, $$
$$ \Rightarrow\;F_{z}=-kz,\quad k=2\pi^{2}r_{0}^{4}\frac{\alpha\beta}{L}B_{0}^{2}, $$
which is a linear restoring force. The equation of motion in the $z$‑direction is
$$ -kz-mg=m\ddot{z}.\qquad(4\,\text{pts}) $$
The force‑balance point is
$$ z_{0}=-mg/k=-\frac{mgL}{2\pi^{2}r_{0}^{4}\alpha\beta B_{0}^{2}}. $$
The ring oscillates harmonically about this equilibrium; the amplitude and angular frequency are
$$ A=|z_{0}|=\frac{mgL}{2\pi^{2}r_{0}^{4}\alpha\beta B_{0}^{2}},\quad\omega=\sqrt{\frac{k}{m}}=\sqrt{\frac{2\pi^{2}r_{0}^{4}\alpha\beta B_{0}^{2}}{mL}}.\qquad(2\,\text{pts}) $$
The equation of motion, i.e. the function $z(t)$, is
$$ z=A(\cos\omega t-1).\qquad(1\,\text{pt}) $$
The current in the ring is
$$ i=\frac{\pi}{L}r_{0}^{2}\alpha B_{0}z=\frac{\pi}{L}r_{0}^{2}\alpha B_{0}A(\cos\omega t-1), $$
$$ \Rightarrow\begin{cases}
i=I_{0}(\cos\omega t-1),\\
I_{0}=\frac{\pi}{L}r_{0}^{2}\alpha B_{0}\frac{mgL}{2\pi^{2}r_{0}^{4}\alpha\beta B_{0}^{2}}=\frac{mg}{2\pi r_{0}^{2}\beta B_{0}}.
\end{cases}\qquad(2\,\text{pts}) $$
(2) The physical origin of $\mathscr{E}_{\text{mot}}$ is the magnetic force $F=qv\times B$ on charged particles in the ring when it moves vertically. From this one can derive (omitted) the emf for a ring element $\mathrm{d}l$ as
$$ \mathrm{d}\mathscr{E}_{\text{mot}}=(v\times B)\cdot\mathrm{d}l=vB_{r_{0}}\,\mathrm{d}l, $$
integrating to
$$ \begin{aligned}
\mathscr{E}&=\oint_{\text{ring}}vB_{r_{0}}\,\mathrm{d}l=vB_{0}\beta r_{0}\cdot 2\pi r_{0}, \\
&\Rightarrow\;\mathscr{E}_{\text{mot}}=2\pi r_{0}^{2}\beta B_{0}v.
\end{aligned} $$
Comparing with the expression obtained from Faraday’s law in part (1),
$$ \mathscr{E}_{\text{mot}}=\pi r_{0}^{2}\alpha B_{0}v, $$
we get
$$ \beta=\frac{\alpha}{2}=8\,\text{m}^{-1}.\qquad(5\,\text{pts}) $$
(This relation can also be derived from Gauss’s law for magnetism, omitted.)
Substituting the given data and the computed $\beta$ into the relevant quantities in $z(t)$ and $i(t)$ yields
$$ A=4.05\,\text{cm},\quad\omega=15.6\,/\!\text{s},\quad I_{0}=39.1\,\text{A}.\qquad(1\,\text{pt}) $$
Since the upper surface of the magnetic rod is at $z=-10\,\text{cm}$, the ring will not collide with the rod during its oscillatory motion.
img_cn:
图823_1包含题目文字和一个示意简图。
题目文字描述了物理情景：一个匀质超导圆环（质量m、半径r₀、电感L）初始静止在竖直磁棒上方，圆环中心轴与磁棒轴重合并取为z轴。磁场对称分布，给出B_z和B_r表达式。t=0时释放圆环使其竖直平动。电流正方向由虚线箭头表示。
示意图画出了竖直磁棒（圆柱形）和水平放置的超导圆环，圆环中心在磁棒轴线上。磁棒上表面位置标为z=-10cm。图中有一条虚线箭头指示圆环电流正方向。
img_en:
Image 823_1 contains the problem text and a schematic diagram.
The text describes the physical situation: a homogeneous superconducting ring (mass m, radius r₀, inductance L) initially at rest above a vertical magnetic rod; the central axes coincide and are taken as the z‑axis. The magnetic field is symmetric, with expressions for B_z and B_r. At t=0 the ring is released to move translationally in the vertical direction. The positive direction of the ring current is indicated by a dashed arrow.
The schematic shows a vertical magnetic rod (cylindrical) and a horizontally placed superconducting ring, the centre of the ring lying on the rod’s axis. The upper surface of the rod is marked as z = -10 cm. A dashed arrow in the figure indicates the positive direction of the ring current.
problem_answer:
(1) $z(t)=A(\cos\omega t-1)$，$i(t)=I_0(\cos\omega t-1)$，其中
$A=\dfrac{mgL}{2\pi^{2}r_{0}^{4}\alpha\beta B_{0}^{2}}$，$\omega=\sqrt{\dfrac{2\pi^{2}r_{0}^{4}\alpha\beta B_{0}^{2}}{mL}}$，$I_0=\dfrac{mg}{2\pi r_{0}^{2}\beta B_{0}}$。
(2) $\beta=8\,\text{m}^{-1}$；数值计算得$A=4.05\,\text{cm}$，$\omega=15.6\,/\!\text{s}$，$I_0=39.1\,\text{A}$。
